calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Lien Lac, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Jackson Tse.
Brian Carideo, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendants: Robert Gilson and Christina Waltman.
The Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305-B for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed settlement agreement "Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal of Action" which was NOT filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar, TRIAL DATE VACATED.
